capability_questions.capability_name: Service exists and is in good condition

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have an incident management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an enterprise incident management service exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Enterprise incident management service exists

questions.prompt: Is the incident management service reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the incident management service is reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular incident management service efficacy review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise formalize and document KPIs and KRIs for the incident management service?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether incident management KPIs and KRIs are documented
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented KPIs and KRIs for incident management service

questions.prompt: Are incident management KPIs and KRIs reviewed at least quarterly?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether KPIs and KRIs are reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular KPI/KRI review

questions.prompt: Do KPIs or KRIs track mean time to respond (MTTR) or mean time to contain security incidents?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether MTTR and containment metrics are tracked
questions.evaluation_focus: Mean time to respond and contain metrics

questions.prompt: Are AI triage accuracy or escalation rates from automated incident handling measured?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether AI triage and escalation metrics are tracked
questions.evaluation_focus: AI triage accuracy and escalation rates

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized, documented incident management process applicable enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formal enterprise-wide incident management process exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented enterprise-wide incident management process

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized, documented triaging process applicable enterprise-wide?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formal enterprise-wide triaging process exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented enterprise-wide triaging process

questions.prompt: Is security orchestration and automation (SOAR) utilized as part of incident management and triaging?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether SOAR is used in incident management and triaging
questions.evaluation_focus: SOAR utilized as part of incident management and triaging

questions.prompt: Are incident management and triage processes reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether incident and triage processes are reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular incident and triage process review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise engage in tabletop exercises for high-impact threat scenarios such as ransomware?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether tabletop exercises cover high-impact threat scenarios
questions.evaluation_focus: Tabletop exercises for high-impact threat scenarios

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise review findings and implement recommendations from tabletop exercises?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether tabletop exercise recommendations are implemented
questions.evaluation_focus: Review and implement tabletop exercise recommendations

questions.prompt: Does the incident management system utilize predictive analysis to predict possible threat scenarios?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether predictive analysis is used for threat scenarios
questions.evaluation_focus: Predictive analysis for threat scenarios

questions.prompt: Does prediction of threat scenarios happen automatically based on traffic patterns and other baselines?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether threat prediction is automated from baselines
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic prediction based on traffic patterns and baselines

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have appropriate segmentation and incident management processes to contain day-zero attacks?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether segmentation and processes contain day-zero attacks
questions.evaluation_focus: Segmentation and processes to contain day-zero attacks

questions.prompt: Does containment of threats and attacks happen automatically through segmentation design or rapid threat containment?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether threat containment is automated
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic threat and attack containment

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented process for implementing and utilizing threat hunting?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formal threat hunting process exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented threat hunting process

questions.prompt: Is the threat hunting process automated and performed by personnel with the right skillset?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether threat hunting is automated with skilled personnel
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated threat hunting with skilled personnel

questions.prompt: Does the incident management system automate threat hunting to some level?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the incident management system supports threat hunting automation
questions.evaluation_focus: Incident management system threat hunting automation

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented incident response plan?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formal incident response plan exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented incident response plan

questions.prompt: Are all necessary points of contact listed in the incident management plan for who must be included during an incident?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether points of contact are listed in the incident plan
questions.evaluation_focus: Points of contact listed in incident management plan

questions.prompt: Is the incident response plan reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the incident response plan is reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular incident response plan review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a clear documented hierarchy for incident management with first responders and their first steps documented?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether incident hierarchy and first responder steps are documented
questions.evaluation_focus: Documented incident management hierarchy and first responder steps

questions.prompt: Does the incident management team have representation from necessary business units such as security, legal, HR, infrastructure, endpoints, and SOC?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the incident response team is cross-functional
questions.evaluation_focus: Cross-functional incident response team representation

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized and documented breach notification process?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether a formal breach notification process exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented breach notification process

questions.prompt: Is the breach notification process reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether the breach notification process is reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular breach notification process review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise incident management capability include digital forensics?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether digital forensics capability exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Digital forensics capability

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a formalized documented process for capturing digital forensic artifacts?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether forensic artifact capture is formalized
questions.evaluation_focus: Formalized documented forensic artifact capture process

questions.prompt: Does the incident management platform automatically capture key artifacts before digital forensics begins?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether key artifacts are captured automatically before forensics
questions.evaluation_focus: Automatic key artifact capture before forensics

questions.prompt: Is the digital forensics process and technology reviewed at least quarterly for efficacy?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether digital forensics is reviewed on a regular cadence
questions.evaluation_focus: Regular digital forensics process and technology review

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise have a ticketing system to register incidents?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether an incident ticketing system exists
questions.evaluation_focus: Ticketing system for incident registration

questions.prompt: Does the enterprise deploy AI to automate and orchestrate incident handling processes?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether AI automates incident handling orchestration
questions.evaluation_focus: AI for automated incident handling orchestration

questions.prompt: Do analysts maintain oversight and approval authority over AI-orchestrated incident workflows?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether analysts oversee AI-orchestrated incident workflows
questions.evaluation_focus: Analyst oversight of AI-orchestrated incident workflows

questions.prompt: Does the organization use AI to assist initial incident classification and severity scoring?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether AI assists incident classification and severity scoring
questions.evaluation_focus: AI-assisted incident classification and severity scoring

questions.prompt: Is incident routing to appropriate response teams automated based on AI-assisted triage?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether triage-based routing to response teams is automated
questions.evaluation_focus: Automated routing to response teams based on triage

questions.prompt: Are AI triage decisions validated by human analysts before escalation or containment actions?
questions.intent: Evaluate whether human analysts validate AI triage decisions
questions.evaluation_focus: Human validation of AI triage decisions
